title: xylophyllos odoratus
intro: Xylophyllos odoratus, also known as the Fragrant Xylophyll, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xylophyllos odoratus include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Xylophyllos odoratus include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
